_comment: Persistent strangle-strategy parameters. Loaded each morning. Changes take effect next trading day. Lot sizes confirmed from Fyers symbol master 2026-06-25: NIFTY=65, SENSEX=20.
_retention_note: 0 = keep all trading days forever (no pruning).

google_sheets._comment: V2 P&L logging into the existing 'Trading Journal' sheet. Auth = OAuth (user consent), NOT a service account (org policy blocks SA keys). Put the OAuth Desktop-app client at oauth_client_file, run '--auth' once to cache oauth_token_file, then set spreadsheet_id to the Trading Journal id. One tab PER INDEX (auto-created); PAPER and LIVE rows share a tab, told apart by the Mode column. enabled=false until configured.
